tool_args.label: Fitch Upgrades Transportation Revenue Bonds to AA

payload.claim_text: Fitch Ratings again upgraded the Transportation Revenue Bonds under their revised criteria from A to AA just before this sale and provided a good news momentum for the pricing.
payload.subject: Fitch Ratings

evidence_refs.source_quote: Fitch Ratings again upgraded the Transportation Revenue Bonds under their revised criteria from A to AA just before this sale

tool_args.label: Three of Four Rating Agencies Upgraded

payload.claim_text: Three out of the four rating agencies which rate these bonds assigned upgraded ratings last year.
payload.subject: Transportation Revenue Bonds

evidence_refs.source_quote: three out of the four rating agencies which rate these bonds assigned upgraded ratings last year.

payload.claim_text: This extension is needed to allow the MTA to develop a solicitation for a consolidated procurement of services through a category management approach that will aggregate requirements across the Agencies in common geographic regions, potentially generating cost savings.
